system.description: When you order an ally to overcome fear, pain, doubt, or delusion, roll +CHA: on a 10+, they do it; on a 7-9, a PC gets advantage to do it; an NPC will do it, but they'll need time, they'll resent you, or they'll feel humiliated (GM decides).

partial.value: A PC gets advantage to do it; an NPC does it but at a cost (GM decides).
